final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a high-end medical aesthetic clinic interior, specifically a modern skin management treatment room.

Style/medium: commercial architectural photography, clean minimalist aesthetic with natural warmth, editorial style suitable for luxury magazine spreads and brand collateral
Composition: symmetrical centered layout, eye-level perspective, medium focal length capturing full treatment room depth, balanced negative space emphasizing professional order
Subject: ergonomic electric aesthetic treatment bed as central anchor, surrounded by medical-grade LED light therapy device and radiofrequency equipment, large digital skin analysis display on wall showing data readouts
Scene/backdrop: minimalist white and natural wood interior, floor-to-ceiling skincare display cabinet with luxury medical beauty products (hyaluronic acid serums, collagen masks, anti-aging ampoules), frosted glass sliding door with soft corridor light diffusing through, subtle green plant accents
Lighting/mood: soft natural medical-grade clean lighting with intelligent dimming system, shadowless surgical ceiling lights, gentle color temperature transitions, warm yet clinical atmosphere
Color palette: warm white as base, natural wood tones as anchor, soft greens from plants as accent, restrained saturation for premium feel
Materials/textures: genuine leather bed surface with subtle grain, cold metallic sheen on precision instruments, warm tactile wood grain, frosted glass diffusion, matte medical-grade surfaces
Constraints: must convey "technology meets nature" design philosophy; emphasize professional cleanliness and warmth simultaneously; suitable for official promotional brochures and high-end magazine advertising
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh fluorescent lighting, plastic-looking materials, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer terms
